meta.note: Community feedback board. Items are roadmap features + community-submitted ideas. Vote counts show interest; top-voted un-started ideas get promoted onto the roadmap. Statuses: idea → investigating → developing → deploying → completed.

items.title: Follow topics → alerts (email, text, RSS)
items.desc: Subscribe to a topic and get notified when it moves.

items.title: Cover more towns (multi-municipality)
items.desc: Bring GovAgenda to other cities from the same platform.

items.title: Automated weekly data refresh
items.desc: Keep the record current automatically every week.

items.title: Meetings calendar + agenda preview
items.desc: Upcoming meetings and what's on them, with a subscribable calendar.

items.title: Plain-language “what this means” summaries
items.desc: A clear explainer on each item.

items.title: Weekly digest email
items.desc: A Monday roundup of the topics you follow.

items.title: Per-commissioner accountability pages
items.desc: A neutral record of each official's quotes, positions, and votes.

items.title: Rights Watch — Bill of Rights lens
items.desc: Neutrally flag topics that touch constitutional rights and the dialog they raise.

items.title: Trending topics & search trends
items.desc: Surface what the community is actually watching.

items.title: National-significance / severity tag
items.desc: Flag when a local item ties to a bigger national issue, tuned to your interests.

items.title: Alert me when my street is on an agenda
items.desc: Community idea — address-based alerts.

items.title: Sticky & shareable watchlist
items.desc: Pins that persist and share as a link.

items.title: Shareable / embeddable topic links
items.desc: Deep-link and embed any topic.

items.title: Vote / position tracking
items.desc: Who voted how, where the record shows it.

items.title: Spanish-language version
items.desc: Community idea — a Spanish translation of the site.

items.title: Full-text search of source documents
items.desc: Search inside agendas/minutes and jump to the page.

items.title: Open data / API + downloads
items.desc: Publish the dataset for others to build on.

items.title: Logo + brand theme
items.desc: GovAgenda logo and navy/red theme.

items.title: Custom domain (govagenda.org)
items.desc: Live on our own domain over HTTPS.

items.title: Ordinance / resolution badges
items.desc: Cleaner, clearer topic labels.
